# Locked dependency versions for SDACS — Phase 704 reproducibility.
#
# Generated FROM requirements.txt by:
#     bash scripts/reproduce/make_lock.sh
#
# Regenerate when any requirements.txt entry changes.
# Commit the regenerated file in the SAME commit as the requirements.txt change.
#
# Pin policy:
#   * Exact == versions for everything actually imported by SDACS.
#   * Build/test tooling (pip, setuptools, wheel) pinned in the Dockerfile.
#   * Hashes (--hash=sha256:...) recommended for paper artifacts —
#     uncomment the hash lines below and regenerate via pip-compile
#     --generate-hashes.

# ── Core simulation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
numpy==2.0.1
simpy==4.1.1
pandas==2.2.2
scipy==1.13.1
pyyaml==6.0.2
joblib==1.4.2
tqdm==4.66.4

# ── Visualization (only if Dash UI is in scope; the headless reproducible
#    image can drop these — see Dockerfile.reproducible) ───────────────────
matplotlib==3.9.0
plotly==5.22.0
seaborn==0.13.2
dash==2.17.1

# ── Dev / test ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pytest==8.2.2
pytest-cov==5.0.0
pytest-asyncio==0.23.7

# ── Indirect / transitive (frequent breakers — pin explicitly) ────────────
python-dateutil==2.9.0.post0
pytz==2024.1
six==1.16.0
packaging==24.1
jinja2==3.1.4
markupsafe==2.1.5
typing-extensions==4.12.2
